## OVERVIEW

Chat VSL is Jon Benson's AI-powered system for creating complete Video Sales Letters using ChatGPT-4 Plus. It builds on his original 3X VSL Formula but adds the AI layer — pre-prompting methodology, prompt libraries, and AI-specific techniques like in-context training and dimensionalization refinement.

The course teaches a complete end-to-end workflow: Buyer's Roadmap (data gathering) -> 5-Step VSL Formula (copy generation) -> Prompt Library (12 reusable prompts) -> Editing (refiner prompts, radio voice elimination).

**Demo product used throughout:** "Old School New Body" (ClickBank fitness offer Jon wrote 11 years prior, still selling).

## KEY FRAMEWORKS EXTRACTED

### 1. Buyer's Roadmap (3 Parts)
Pre-prompting data foundation: 12 SEARCH fields + Positive/Negative hooks + Offer branding. All data gathered BEFORE any VSL prompt.

### 2. ChatVSL 5-Step Formula
Snap Suggestion (~1000w) -> Vital Connection (~1500w) -> Big Problem (~500w) -> Bigger Solution (~800w) -> Grand Offer (~2200w). Total ~6000 words.

### 3. 12-Prompt Library
Reusable prompt system: Roadmap, Refiner, Branding, Expansion, Rewrite, Offer Branding, Pattern Interrupt (x2), Lead, Different Goals, Get Specific, Bullet Expander, Returns.

### 4. 9 Attention Frames
N1 (notice VSL) -> N2 (notice hero) -> N3 (permission) -> O1 (negative hook) -> O2 (positive hook) -> W3 (killer wants) + 90 Seconds of Desire + Future Pacing + NLP Close.

### 5. Grand Offer 6-Part Structure
3 Choices Intro -> Features (So-Rather-Than) -> Faux Price -> Dimensional Bonuses -> Guarantee+Community -> NLP Close (future pacing + presupposition + click anchor).

### 6. Metabolic Dissection
Reverse-engineering of $50M Metabolic Sherpa VSL. Line-by-line analysis mapping all 9 attention frames, open loops, NLP techniques, transition triggers.

| Open loops | 10-12 | Per VSL |
